response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Individual Contributor (Staff/Senior SWE) with strong backend and distributed systems expertise, but he entirely lacks the executive leadership, organizational scaling, and team management experience required for a CTO role. Furthermore, while he has recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, he does not demonstrate the extensive production track record with high-stakes, multi-agent AI architectures demanded by this position.
strengths: Deep backend and distributed systems expertise, including handling high-throughput microservices.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) at Google.
Strong software craftsmanship background with a heavy emphasis on test-driven development and system reliability.
concerns: Zero executive leadership or engineering management experience; career has been strictly in IC roles.
Lacks the required track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people.
AI agent experience appears recent and lacks the deep, multi-year production maturity required to architect a core AI-native fintech platform.
